description: Model must plan a two-step CMS workflow: search for articles with a given tag, then fetch the full content of the first result using its slug. Tests slug extraction from a search result and correct parameter threading into the follow-up fetch call.
prompt: Find articles tagged 'observability' in the CMS and then retrieve the full content of the first result. Describe the sequence of tool calls you would make, including how you would extract the slug from the search results to use in the fetch.

toolDefinitions.name: search_articles
toolDefinitions.description: Searches the CMS article index by tag. Returns a list of matching articles with their slugs and titles.

tag.description: Tag to filter articles by, e.g. 'observability'.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

toolDefinitions.name: fetch_article
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves the full content and metadata for a CMS article by its slug.

slug.description: URL-safe article identifier returned by search_articles.
